content: What is weather in Frankfurt tomorrow ?
Tomorrow in Frankfurt, expect broken clouds with temperatures ranging from a minimum of 10°C to a maximum of 19°C.
What will it rain there on monday?
On Monday, there will be few clouds, so it doesn't look like it will rain.
What is weather in Berlin on Friday ?
On Friday in Berlin, expect few clouds with temperatures ranging from a minimum of 13°C to a maximum of 16°C.
